title: Verification Policy
description: Optional verification policy for HITL Protocol v0.8. Defines when proof_of_human evidence is required and how it must be bound.

mode.description: Whether verification evidence is optional, required, or only required as a step-up.

required_for.description: Submission paths for which verification must be satisfied.

any_of.description: OR-of-AND policy logic. Any option may satisfy the policy; each option requires all listed evidence requirements.

case_id.description: Whether accepted evidence must be bound to the HITL case_id.

action.description: Whether accepted evidence must be bound to the submitted action.

challenge.description: Opaque service-generated challenge for provider-specific binding.

freshness_seconds.description: Maximum age of the accepted evidence at the time of verification.

expires_at.description: Absolute policy expiry timestamp for the verification challenge.

single_use.description: Whether equivalent evidence can only be used once for the declared case/action binding.

on_missing.description: Fallback behavior when required evidence is missing.

on_invalid.description: Fallback behavior when presented evidence fails verification.

proof_type.description: Normative core value in v0.8 is proof_of_human. Custom extensions MUST use x- prefixes.

provider.description: Provider identifier (for example world_id). Omit to accept any provider for the proof type.

min_assurance.description: Minimum service-defined assurance level required for this proof.

presentation_formats.description: Optional allowed presentation formats for provider evidence.
